name: 2026 2027 Cars Drag Puzzle
description: Revolutionary car jigsaw featuring exclusive previews of 2026–2027 unreleased vehicles. Every level randomizes one hidden car image split into 3×3 to 6×6 shuffled tiles. Correct neighboring pieces merge into movable blocks; drag and swap any tile or cluster to rebuild the picture quickly. The big reveal: you can only find out which upcoming car model you’re assembling once the entire puzzle is completed.
instructions: Drag pieces to swap positions pieces that belong next to each other will merge into a cluster clusters move together allowing you to position multiple pieces at once You can upload your images to play
